sp_widget.name: sads
sp_widget.template:
New Patient Registration

Enter patient details for immediate triage and bed assignment.

{{c.data.successMessage}}

{{c.data.newP.number}}
{{c.data.newP.full_name}}
{{c.data.newP.age}}
{{c.data.newP.gender}}
{{c.data.newP.registered_date}}
Assigned Doctor: {{c.data.newP.doctor}} | Assigned Nurse: {{c.data.newP.nurse}}
Medical Department: {{c.data.newP.department}}
